_comment: The Config·JSON 'sweep' value. trials = the swept grid (ONLY the dimensions that vary, string-valued); the constant base (epochs/batch/workers) lives in the Train Model node config and is merged in per trial (trial wins per key). dataset = the shared training channel. The connect-stack SageMaker exec role (conduit-sagemaker-exec-*) is widened to read s3://try-conduit-app/examples/*, so it reads this directly; a dataset elsewhere must live under a conduit-* bucket (or widen the exec role to it + redeploy the connect stack).
